ref_classifications.reason: 原書正文引用 Fig. 22-19，但 Chapter 22 raw PDF 只有 Figure 22-18（SOA of an n-channel enhancement mode MOSFET），且 PDF 文字層全文搜尋只有該引用處出現 22-19，沒有 Figure 22-19 caption 或對應圖可裁；屬原書編號/交叉參照跳號，非 catalog 可真修。
ref_classifications.evidence: raw_pdfs/mohan_power_electronics.pdf page 643 text cites 'FBSOA of the power MOSFET shown in Fig. 22-19'; pages 596/598 contain Section 22-6-5 and Figure 22-18 for the MOSFET SOA, and no Figure 22-19 exists in the PDF text/catalog.
